series_metadata.series_description: The telephone monitoring database creates reports used for general management uses, as well as disciplinary actions. All outgoing telephone calls are received via CD from DAS and uploaded into the database on a monthly basis. Queries have been created within the database to create unique monthly reports.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 30 days, unless creation of a disciplinary action occurs. ; Electronic: (electronic reports) 30 days, unless creation of a disciplinary action occurs. (Databases 90days) (CD 90days)
